scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently -n dice,dnd,hero,inv,act,room,shd,rnd,enm,wld,inp,gam,api,vite -c magenta,cyan,green,blue,red,magenta,cyan,blue,red,green,yellow,magenta,white,gray "npm run dev -w @wow/dice-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/dnd-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/hero-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/inventory-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/action-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/room-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/shade-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/render-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/enemy-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/world-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/input-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/game-service" "node --watch packages/wow/server.cjs" "npm run dev -w wow"
scripts.start: npx -y concurrently -n dice,dnd,hero,inv,act,room,shd,rnd,enm,wld,inp,gam,api -c magenta,cyan,green,blue,red,magenta,cyan,blue,red,green,yellow,magenta,white "node packages/dice-service/index.js" "node packages/dnd-service/index.js" "node packages/hero-service/index.js" "node packages/inventory-service/index.js" "node packages/action-service/index.js" "node packages/generators/room-service/index.js" "node packages/shade-service/index.js" "node packages/render-service/index.js" "node packages/generators/enemy-service/index.js" "node packages/world-service/index.js" "node packages/input-service/index.js" "node packages/game-service/index.js" "node packages/wow/server.cjs"
scripts.deploy: gcloud run deploy wow-monorepo --source . --port 3001 --project wow-now-491200 --region us-central1 --allow-unauthenticated --memory 1Gi --cpu 2 --timeout 300
